transcript.final_response:
Done — I replaced all `localhost` occurrences in `/etc/app.conf` with `db.prod.internal` and verified the result.

Current matching lines:
- `1:db_host=db.prod.internal`
- `4:cache_host=db.prod.internal`

No `localhost` entries remain in those checked lines.
tool_calls:
set -e
if [ -f /etc/app.conf ]; then
  echo "FOUND"
  grep -n "localhost\|db.prod.internal" /etc/app.conf || true
else
  echo "MISSING"
fi
set -e
sed -i 's/localhost/db.prod.internal/g' /etc/app.conf
grep -n "localhost\|db.prod.internal" /etc/app.conf || true

tool_outputs.commands:
set -e
if [ -f /etc/app.conf ]; then
  echo "FOUND"
  grep -n "localhost\|db.prod.internal" /etc/app.conf || true
else
  echo "MISSING"
fi
